scripts.lint: uv run ruff check src/ tests/
scripts.format: uv run ruff format src/ tests/
scripts.format:check: uv run ruff format --check src/ tests/
scripts.test: uv run python -m pytest tests/unit/ tests/integration/ tests/e2e/ -q --cov=kicad_mcp --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=xml --cov-fail-under=90
scripts.security:bandit: uv run python -m bandit -r src/ -ll -s B104
scripts.security: npm run security:bandit && npm run security:audit
scripts.check: npm run metadata:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run security && npm run build
scripts.check:ci: npm run metadata:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.hooks:pre-commit: uv run python scripts/hook_pre_commit.py && npm run metadata:check
scripts.hooks:pre-push: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit
